skip_reason: Bookmarklet is meant to run on an individual Instagram post page (appends 'media/?size=l' to the current URL) and opens a new window/tab containing the raw image. Instagram media URLs require an authenticated session to load reliably, and the bookmarklet's effect (a new window) cannot be asserted in headless CI.
notes: Passive - takes window.location.href, appends 'media/?size=l', and opens a new window that writes an tag pointing at that URL with a 'Right click on the image to save it' message. No in-page modal is created on the original page, so there's nothing to assert there even if it ran.
